MOTION To Compel Deft Foster Wheeler Llc To Produce Its Custodian Of Records And Person Most Knowledgeable For Deposition And To Produce Documents At Deposition
Off Calendar Mar-10-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
John B. Goldstein, Esq., for plaintiff and moving party:
James Parker, Esq., for defendant and opposing party: Foster Wheeler LLC

AFTER HEARING, Plaintiff Lucile Beauleieu and John Bearuleieu's motion to compel defendant Foster Wheeler LLC's PMK-COR for deposition is taken off calendar. Motion for Summary Judgment was granted. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN. Not reported.

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Mar-07-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- ATTY. MEI HON OF BRAYTON & PURCELL, TEL. NO. 898-1555 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. JOSETTE JOHNSON AND JAMES PARKER OF BRYDON, HUGO & PARKER, TEL. NO. 808-0300 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED IT'S TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS - DEFENDANT FOSTER WHEELER, LLC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR A CONTINUANCE IS DENIED, GIVEN THE ABSENCE OF ANY EVIDENCE THAT DECEDENT WORKED AROUND A PUMP, LET ALONE ARE OF DEFENDANT'S PLAINTIFF HAS NOT SHOWN ANY REASONABLE LIKELIHOOD THAT A P M K DEPOSITION WILL PROVIDE MATERIAL EVIDENCE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR# 8189 =301/PJB/PM
